records.m_Talk_ENG: Already... how many Guardians has she taken down on her own?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Already... how many Guardians has she taken down on her own?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Already... how many Guardians has she taken down on her own?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how many she defeats, Tammiel will not stop. There is no limit to the power she wields.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how many she defeats, Tammiel will not stop. There is no limit to the power she wields.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how many she defeats, Tammiel will not stop. There is no limit to the power she wields.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If one falls, then two. If two fall, then four. If four fall, then eight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If one falls, then two. If two fall, then four. If four fall, then eight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If one falls, then two. If two fall, then four. If four fall, then eight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That cycle will never end. Not until every one of those you revived disappears.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That cycle will never end. Not until every one of those you revived disappears.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That cycle will never end. Not until every one of those you revived disappears.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their deaths are nothing more than a fate arbitrarily decided by the god called Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their deaths are nothing more than a fate arbitrarily decided by the god called Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their deaths are nothing more than a fate arbitrarily decided by the god called Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not allow them to remain at the mercy of your rules any longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not allow them to remain at the mercy of your rules any longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not allow them to remain at the mercy of your rules any longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But it's also true that there's no way to defeat Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But it's also true that there's no way to defeat Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But it's also true that there's no way to defeat Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how great your power is, you cannot defeat a being that is not bound by rules.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how great your power is, you cannot defeat a being that is not bound by rules.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how great your power is, you cannot defeat a being that is not bound by rules.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you said, we cannot stop Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you said, we cannot stop Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you said, we cannot stop Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the authority of the Tree of Sephiroth, she created rules of her own and has manipulated everything within them using the threads of fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the authority of the Tree of Sephiroth, she created rules of her own and has manipulated everything within them using the threads of fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the authority of the Tree of Sephiroth, she created rules of her own and has manipulated everything within them using the threads of fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, she is currently exercising her power within the still-unfinished Qliphoth Game as Tammiel, the first god and the Demon Lord at the apex of the Qliphoth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, she is currently exercising her power within the still-unfinished Qliphoth Game as Tammiel, the first god and the Demon Lord at the apex of the Qliphoth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, she is currently exercising her power within the still-unfinished Qliphoth Game as Tammiel, the first god and the Demon Lord at the apex of the Qliphoth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Can you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure I just... saw my sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure I just... saw my sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure I just... saw my sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tammiel has descended, temporarily halting the flow of causality in order to eliminate everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tammiel has descended, temporarily halting the flow of causality in order to eliminate everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tammiel has descended, temporarily halting the flow of causality in order to eliminate everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, they need your help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, they need your help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, they need your help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My... help?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My... help?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My... help?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you know. I'm no longer the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you know. I'm no longer the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you know. I'm no longer the Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone like me... what could I possibly do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone like me... what could I possibly do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone like me... what could I possibly do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. You are nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. You are nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. You are nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are someone who cast off the shackles of the fate called the Wolf. Someone no longer bound by the rules Tammiel set.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are someone who cast off the shackles of the fate called the Wolf. Someone no longer bound by the rules Tammiel set.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are someone who cast off the shackles of the fate called the Wolf. Someone no longer bound by the rules Tammiel set.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why only you can stop her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why only you can stop her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why only you can stop her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not for my sake, but for all those suffering under the weight of fate... please take hold of this fate and stand against her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not for my sake, but for all those suffering under the weight of fate... please take hold of this fate and stand against her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not for my sake, but for all those suffering under the weight of fate... please take hold of this fate and stand against her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason she accepted the fate of the Golden Tree and chose to become the will of the world itself... was not simply because she wanted to revive the dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason she accepted the fate of the Golden Tree and chose to become the will of the world itself... was not simply because she wanted to revive the dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason she accepted the fate of the Golden Tree and chose to become the will of the world itself... was not simply because she wanted to revive the dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A being that protects the world from the threat of its end...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A being that protects the world from the threat of its end...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A being that protects the world from the threat of its end...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The final stronghold the world chooses to defeat the Demon Lord...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The final stronghold the world chooses to defeat the Demon Lord...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The final stronghold the world chooses to defeat the Demon Lord...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yoo Mina?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yoo Mina?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yoo Mina?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tammiel...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tammiel...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tammiel...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She intended to create an Antagonist who could defeat the Demon Lord Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She intended to create an Antagonist who could defeat the Demon Lord Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She intended to create an Antagonist who could defeat the Demon Lord Tammiel.
